name: openmm-lj-pair-v1
description: A live OpenMM benchmark that measures how closely the optimization loop can recover the known Lennard-Jones equilibrium energy and separation.
paper_hypothesis: The agentic Autolab loop can approach the known Lennard-Jones optimum with a small number of real OpenMM evaluations while preserving full provenance and rerunnable artifacts.

evaluation.reference_note: For a Lennard-Jones pair, the global minimum occurs at r = 2^(1/6) sigma and V(r*) = -epsilon.
